# ===== Default Exclusion Patterns =====
# One pattern per line, # for comments
# HTTrack filter syntax: -*pattern*
#
# Auto-generated by mirror.sh on first run if missing.
# Edit freely. Add more patterns as needed.

# Social media / tracking
-*facebook*
-*twitter*
-*x.com*
-*instagram*
-*linkedin*
-*youtube*
-*tiktok*
-*pinterest*
-*reddit*

# Ads / analytics
-*google-analytics*
-*googletagmanager*
-*doubleclick*
-*googlesyndication*
-*adsense*
-*addthis*
-*sharethis*
-*disqus*

# Search engines
-*google.com/search*
-*bing.com*
-*duckduckgo*

# Wikipedia / Wikia (often inadvertently linked)
-*wikipedia*
-*wikimedia*
-*fandom.com*

# Prevent spidering into OSS license / project ecosystems
# (GNU FDL / Creative Commons links cause cascading crawls)
-*fsf.org*
-*gnu.org*
-*libreplanet*
-*defectivebydesign*
-*creativecommons*
-*windows7sins*
-*wikidot.com*
